title: nasturtium sativum
intro: Nasturtium sativum, also known as garden cress or Indian cress, is an annual edible plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant is known for its peppery flavor and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help soothe sore throats and aid in digestion. Consuming nasturtium sativum has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as providing antioxidants and anti-cancer properties. Nasturtium sativum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including fresh leaves and flowers, seeds, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salads, and other culinary dishes.
